questions.text: A line graph is used to show:
questions.explanation: Line graphs are used to display data that changes continuously over time.

questions.text: The point where x-axis and y-axis meet is called origin.
questions.explanation: The origin is the point of intersection of x-axis and y-axis. Its coordinates are (0, 0).

questions.correctAnswer: A circular graph divided into sectors showing parts of a whole.
questions.explanation: Pie charts show how a whole is divided into different parts. Each sector represents a portion of the total.

questions.text: In coordinates (x, y), x is called ________.
questions.explanation: In coordinates (x, y), x is the abscissa (x-coordinate), y is the ordinate (y-coordinate).
